description: You are a manufacturing automation engineer setting up a Webots simulation of an automated press cell. Configure the ASSEMBLY_PRESS robot by setting the SliderJoint dampingConstant to 50.0, the press_motor (LinearMotor) maxForce to 500.0, and the load_cell (TouchSensor) type to "force", resolution to 0.1, and lookupTable to [ 0 0 0, 500 500 0 ]. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/assembly_press_configured.wbt.
